text.title: What You Don't Know About Launch Pre-Mortem Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml for What You Don't Know About Launch Pre-Mortem.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers for this engagement?

conclusion.verdict: precondition not met; route to a different methodology or skip.
hard skip condition triggered; do not apply.
apply rule surface-enumerated from 01-core-rules.xml and emit artefact.
apply rule named-fix-owner from 01-core-rules.xml and emit artefact.
apply rule detector-per-failure from 01-core-rules.xml and emit artefact.
apply rule kill-criterion from 01-core-rules.xml and emit artefact.
apply rule revisit-on-launch-week from 01-core-rules.xml and emit artefact.

text.example: Engagement passes applies_if, none of skip_if match. The first non-skip rule signal evaluates to true → conclusion routes to that rule id → agent draft enforces the rule and attaches matching evidence.
